inputs.label: Speed in mph
inputs.businessContext: The speed to convert from miles per hour.

businessContext_i18n.en: The speed to convert from miles per hour.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Geschwindigkeit, die von Meilen pro Stunde umgerechnet werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La vitesse à convertir depuis les miles par heure.
businessContext_i18n.es: La velocidad a convertir desde millas por hora.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: The factor to multiply mph by to get knots. 1 mph = 0.868976 knots (standard). Editable for calibration.

businessContext_i18n.en: The factor to multiply mph by to get knots. 1 mph = 0.868976 knots (standard). Editable for calibration.
businessContext_i18n.tr: mph'yi knot'a çarpmak için faktör. 1 mph = 0,868976 knot (standart). Kalibrasyon için düzenlenebilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Faktor, mit dem mph multipliziert wird, um Knoten zu erhalten. 1 mph = 0,868976 Knoten (Standard). Bearbeitbar für Kalibrierung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le facteur pour multiplier mph afin d'obtenir des nœuds. 1 mph = 0,868976 nœuds (standard). Modifiable pour étalonnage.
businessContext_i18n.es: El factor por el que multiplicar mph para obtener nudos. 1 mph = 0.868976 nudos (estándar). Editable para calibración.

inputs.label: Decimal places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places to round the output knots.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places to round the output knots.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı knot'larını yuvarlamak için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Rundung der Ausgabeknoten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour arrondir les nœuds de sortie.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear los nudos de salida.

inputs.label: Known knots (for QC)
inputs.businessContext: Optional known value in knots to validate conversion accuracy.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional known value in knots to validate conversion accuracy.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüm doğruluğunu doğrulamak için knot cinsinden isteğe bağlı bilinen değer.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optionaler bekannter Wert in Knoten zur Validierung der Umrechnungsgenauigkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur connue facultative en nœuds pour valider la précision de la conversion.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor conocido opcional en nudos para validar la precisión de la conversión.

inputs.label: Tolerance
inputs.businessContext: Maximum allowed deviation between computed and known knots for quality check.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum allowed deviation between computed and known knots for quality check.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalite kontrol için hesaplanan ve bilinen knot arasındaki izin verilen maksimum sapma.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximal zulässige Abweichung zwischen berechneten und bekannten Knoten für die Qualitätsprüfung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart maximal autorisé entre les nœuds calculés et connus pour le contrôle qualité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación máxima permitida entre los nudos calculados y los conocidos para la verificación de calidad.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
